zh.lifeSummary: 當Czaslaw von Schoenfeld於大約1305年出生在德國薩辛可萊斯 德利其瑙多福時，他的父親Siegfried von Schoenfeld37歲，母親Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg28歲。他於大約1333年與Sophie在德國薩辛可萊斯 梅斯拉德爾瑙多福結婚。他們至少是5個兒子的父母。他去世於1374年之前。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Schoenfeld
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Kurt, Otto, Ernst, Erwin, Franz, Klaus, Adelheid, Eugen, Frieda, Fritz, Gerhard, Hanns.
German (Schönfeld): habitational name from any of numerous places called Schönfeld, from Middle High German schoen ‘beautiful’ + velt ‘open country, field’.
Jewish (Ashkenazic; Schönfeld): artificial name composed of German schön ‘beautiful’ + Feld ‘field’. Compare Schonfeld .

variants.name: Schonfeld
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Jewish Chaim, Yoel, Aron, Elihu, Hyman, Mordechi, Naftula, Sholom, Tovia, Zalman.  German Klaus, Erwin, Gunter, Kurt.

variants.name: Schoenfeldt
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Otto, Arno, Kurt.

en.lifeSummary: When Czaslaw von Schoenfeld was born about 1305, in Naundorf, Kreis Delitzsch, Saxony, Germany, his father, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, was 37 and his mother, Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg, was 28. He married Sophie about 1333, in Naundorf, Radebeul, Meißen, Saxony, Germany. They were the parents of at least 5 sons. He died before 1374.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Czaslaw von Schoenfeld est né environ 1305, à Naundorf, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Allemagne, son père, Siegfried von Schoenfeld, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Sophie environ 1333, à Naundorf, Radebeul, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 5 fils. Il est décédé avant 1374.

de.lifeSummary: Als Czaslaw von Schoenfeld um 1305 in Naundorf, Kreis Delitzsch, Sachsen, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Siegfried von Schoenfeld 37 und seine Mutter Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg 28. Er hat um 1333 in Naundorf, Radebeul, Kreis Meißen, Sachsen, Deutschland Sophie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 5 Söhne. Er starb vor 1374.

ko.lifeSummary: Czaslaw von Schoenfeld(이)가 대략 1305년 독일 작센 크레이스 데리츠슈 나운도르프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Siegfried von Schoenfeld(은)는 37세였고, 그의 어머니 Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1333년 독일 작센 크레이스 이ss 라데브우 나운도르프에서 Sophie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 다섯 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1374년 이전 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Czaslaw von Schoenfeld родился около 1305 г. в местности наундорф, крис делицщ, сачсен, Германия, его отцу по имени Siegfried von Schoenfeld было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Mrs. Elizabeth von Schönberg, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Sophie около 1333 г. в местности наундорф, радебеул, крис миssен, сачсен, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 5 сыновей. Он умер перед 1374 г.
